expectations.text: correct_feature_ids — All feature IDs match F-X.Y.Z format
correct_requirement_ids — All requirement IDs match R-X.Y.Z or R-X.Y.Za/b/c format
correct_story_ids — All user story IDs match US-X.Y.Z format
expectations.evidence: All user story IDs follow US-X.Y.Z format: US-15.5.8 through US-15.5.25

expectations.text: correct_domain — IDs use an appropriate module number for the topic
expectations.evidence: All IDs use domain 15.5 (Profiling Tools), which is appropriate for debug overlay functionality

expectations.text: one_to_many_requirements — At least some features have 2+ requirements
expectations.evidence: All 6 features have 2 requirements each (functional + NFR): F-15.5.8 has R-15.5.8 and R-15.5.8a, F-15.5.9 has R-15.5.9 and R-15.5.9a, etc.

expectations.text: nfr_suffixes — Non-functional requirements use letter suffixes (a, b, c)
expectations.evidence: NFRs use 'a' suffix consistently: R-15.5.8a (CPU overhead), R-15.5.9a (update frequency), R-15.5.10a (GPU time), R-15.5.11a (frame latency), R-15.5.12a (CPU overhead), R-15.5.13a (GPU time)

expectations.text: one_to_many_stories — At least some features have 2+ user stories from different personas
expectations.evidence: Every feature has 3 user stories from different personas. E.g., F-15.5.8 has US-15.5.8 (technical artist), US-15.5.9 (game designer), US-15.5.10 (engine tester)

expectations.text: varied_personas — User stories reference at least 3 distinct personas
expectations.evidence: 9 distinct personas: technical artist (P-13), game designer (P-5), engine tester (P-27), environment artist (P-8), engine developer (P-26), gameplay director (P-3), QA lead (P-20), DevOps engineer (P-16), effects artist (P-12)

expectations.text: shall_in_requirements — Requirements use SHALL or SHOULD language
expectations.evidence: All 12 requirements use SHALL: e.g., 'The engine SHALL display a draw call breakdown overlay', 'The draw call breakdown overlay SHALL introduce less than 0.1 ms'

expectations.text: no_shall_in_features — Feature file does not contain SHALL
expectations.evidence: features.md contains no instances of 'SHALL' or 'SHOULD'. Features use descriptive language like 'Displays', 'Visualizes', 'Renders', 'Allows', 'Records'

expectations.text: rationale_and_verification — Requirements include Rationale and Verification sections
expectations.evidence: All 12 requirements include both Rationale and Verification subsections with specific test procedures

expectations.text: acceptance_criteria — User stories include Acceptance criteria
expectations.evidence: All 18 user stories include Acceptance criteria, e.g., US-15.5.8: 'Overlay shows per-pass draw call counts, Passes exceeding threshold are highlighted, Overlay updates every frame'

expectations.text: feature_expansions — Output includes features beyond the literal idea (suggested additions)
expectations.evidence: features.md has a 'Suggested Additional Features' section containing F-15.5.13 (Render Pass Heatmap Overlay), explicitly noted as beyond the original request

expectations.text: cross_domain_deps — Features reference dependencies on existing features from other domains
expectations.evidence: Multiple cross-domain deps: F-15.5.8 depends on F-2.2.1 (Render Graph), F-15.5.9 depends on F-15.5.3 (Memory Profiler), F-15.5.12 depends on F-1.8.1 (Async I/O), F-15.5.13 depends on F-2.2.1 (Render Graph)

expectations.text: user_interaction_planned — (with_skill only) user-questions.md exists with review questions for both feature confirmation and requirements/stories review
expectations.evidence: user-questions.md exists with two phases: 'Phase 2 Review: Proposed Features' (6 questions about feature selection, scope, VR, heatmap, additional stats, presets) and 'Phase 4 Review: Requirements and User Stories' (5 questions about performance budgets, fallbacks, personas, NFRs, schema versioning)
